data.label: 小鱼易联终端 SDK
data.description: 通过小鱼易连终端 SDK，开发者可以快速实现多人音视频通话业务场景。平台提供覆盖手机、桌面全平台的终端 SDK，同时终端用户可以在微信小程序、web 网页使用平台提供的音视频服务。

data.label: XYLink Terminal SDK
data.description: With the XYLink Terminal SDK, developers can quickly implement multi-person audio and video calling scenarios. The platform offers terminal SDKs covering mobile and desktop platforms, while end users can access the audio and video services via WeChat mini-programs and web pages.
